programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout
programme.desc: Supermarket Stakeout is an American cooking competition TV series presented by chef Alex Guarnaschelli. Every participant of the show has a budget of $500 to purchase the groceries from the customers of a nearby supermarket, and create dishes later out of it. In each round the host assigns the theme of the dish to cook. The chef whose dish is judged the least satisfactory is eliminated from the competition, and the final chef remaining gets a prize of $10,000.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods
programme.desc: Travel and cuisine documentary series, hosted by famous Andrew Zimmern, American culinary expert, chef, restaurateur and television personality and spin-off series of ''Bizarre Foods'', focuses on classic, iconic foods (not bizarre like in the original series) from some well-known destinations- moussaka and real Greek yogurt from Athens, sweet macarons and crepes from Paris, Italian gelato, gooey fondue to Swiss chocolate from Zurich, mile-high pastrami sandwiches and bagels from NYC, and many other legendary foods. The show will explore where these dishes came from, how they're prepared, and the best way to enjoy them. Andrew will also discover some secrets and interesting stories behind these epic meals.

programme.title: Next Baking Master: Paris
programme.desc: Hosts Stephanie Boswell and Ludo Lefebvre invite ten up-and-coming American bakers to travel to the epicenter of the sweets universe, Paris, where they will vie to become this generation's great baking master. With unprecedented access to the most iconic pastry shops and experts, their Paris adventure will test their chops in pastry technique, artistry, innovation and flavor. Each week, the lowest performing pastry chef is sent home until one remaining competitor is named the next baking master.

programme.title: Giada at Home
programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is an outstanding culinary specialist, the author of nine New York Times bestselling cookbooks, Emmy award winning television personality and the host of Giada at Home television show. Giada has quite an impressive background of culinary training from Le Cordon Bleu in Paris, which combined with her own unique Californian charm creates her one-of-a-kind recognizable style. In Giada at Home she focuses on cooking at home for friends and family for different occasions and on party planning. Holiday feast or romantic dinner, weekend vibes or average day, it does not matter- the food is always delicious.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Raquelle head to Alta, Chef Keith Corbin's California soul food restaurant. For the kitchen initiation, Corbin puts Selena under pressure with some short order egg cooking, and she quickly learns it's not nearly as simple as it sounds. Once she's proven her mettle, Selena attempts to make a fried fish dish tasty enough for Alta's menu and the restaurant's toughest critic, Renee Corbin.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez finds a taste of home as she tries the best Texas barbecue in Los Angeles at Moo's Craft Barbecue. Husband and wife team Andrew and Michelle Muñoz challenge Selena to create a dish that puts her own spin on their meat-centric menu. She decides to create a unique sausage containing the flavors of one her most favorite guilty pleasure foods! Selena and Raquelle quickly find themselves in over their heads as they realize that they have no idea how sausages are made. The stakes get even higher when Nana and Papa show up, two native Texans ready to see if Selena's dish can make the grade and the menu!

programme.desc: Giada De Laurentiis is an outstanding culinary specialist, the author of nine New York Times bestselling cookbooks, Emmy award winning television personality and the host of Giada at Home television show. Giada has quite an impressive background of culinary training from Le Cordon Bleu in Paris, which combined with her own unique Californian charm creates her one-of-a-kind recognizable style. In Giada at Home she focuses on cooking at home for friends and family for different occasions and on party planning. Holiday feast or romantic dinner, weekend vibes or average day, it does not matter- the food is always delicious.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez and Raquelle head to Alta, Chef Keith Corbin's California soul food restaurant. For the kitchen initiation, Corbin puts Selena under pressure with some short order egg cooking, and she quickly learns it's not nearly as simple as it sounds. Once she's proven her mettle, Selena attempts to make a fried fish dish tasty enough for Alta's menu and the restaurant's toughest critic, Renee Corbin.

programme.title: Selena + Restaurant
programme.desc: Selena Gomez finds a taste of home as she tries the best Texas barbecue in Los Angeles at Moo's Craft Barbecue. Husband and wife team Andrew and Michelle Muñoz challenge Selena to create a dish that puts her own spin on their meat-centric menu. She decides to create a unique sausage containing the flavors of one her most favorite guilty pleasure foods! Selena and Raquelle quickly find themselves in over their heads as they realize that they have no idea how sausages are made. The stakes get even higher when Nana and Papa show up, two native Texans ready to see if Selena's dish can make the grade and the menu!

programme.title: Best Bite In Town
programme.desc: Guy Fieri summons Noah Cappe, Joe Sasto and Aarti Sequeira to try Japanese, Jamaican, Cuban, Greek and American favourites in Port St. Lucie, Florida!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. She cooks in a simple, easy to follow way at her ranch in Pawhuska, Oklahoma. We can learn new techniques and get new ideas in a down to earth way and feed even big families every day with dishes that are both yummy and healthy. It is surprisingly easy to cook following her recipes step by step. Her passion for cooking is appreciated by more than 22 million of people all over the world.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: Ree Drummon is a writer, photographer, ranch wife and mother of four. She is the host of cooking show The Pioneer Woman. programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: Chopped is an American reality cooking TV game show hosted by Ted Allen. Four chefs compete against each other. At the beginning of each round they receive a basket containing four mystery ingredients and are expected to create the best three-course meal using every single one of them. Each round has a time limit. The dishes are judged based on their presentation, taste and creativity. At the end of every round one chef is "chopped" from the competition with no prize. The winner can get up to $50.000.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: After combating countless "impossible dinners," Chef Robert Irvine faces a daunting new challenge: save America's most desperate restaurants from impending failure in just two days with only $10,000. In his new prime-time Food Network series, Restaurant: Impossible, Robert uses creativity and resourcefulness along with a lot of muscle in his fight to rescue these restaurants and give hope to the owners and their employees. Day one of the extreme mission begins with a thorough business assessment as Robert launches the restaurant into full service, closely observes the staff and kitchen, and determines their weakest spots. Then, he springs into action by updating the menu, retraining the staff and implementing aesthetic changes with the help of his design team. To ensure a packed house for the grand re-opening at the end of day two, Robert hits the streets to tell the community about the improved restaurant. Will the ruthless schedule, tight budget and ambitious task overcome Robert's lofty goals, or will this tall order result in restaurant triumph?

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives is American food reality television series about places with the most delicious food. The host is American restaurateur Guy Fieri who travels along the USA, Canada or Europe looking for the most fascinating cafes and introduces them to the viewers. Each show has a specific focus on a certain dish, like burgers, pasta, comfort food. Small cafes with traditional food and home-style recipes or ethnic specialties adored by the locals are of particular interest to the host. Guy Fieri enters the kitchen, gets to know the cook, actively takes part in cooking, interacts with the guests and kitchen staff and gives his humorous spicy comments on the process and the food itself.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: Two talented chefs go head-to-head for the chance to Beat Bobby Flay. To get to Bobby the chefs must first face off against each other, creating a spectacular dish with a secret ingredient of Bobby's choice. Judges Alex Guarnaschelli and Jeff Mauro know Bobby's strengths and his weaknesses. Their goal: Pick the chef who has the skills to take down Bobby Flay in his own arena. The winning chef gets to challenge Bobby with his or her surprise signature dish. If Bobby goes down, the winner can tell the world, "I beat Bobby Flay!"

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: In Food Network's series Kids Baking Championship, hosts and judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli will lead eight talented kid bakers through challenges designed to find the most-impressive and creative young baker. In each challenge the contestants, ranging in age from 10 to 13, will be tested on their baking skills and originality as they whip up delectable desserts, including creative cakes, mouthwatering cookies and pastries.

programme.desc: The program delivers comprehensive reports on current events, providing viewers with detailed information on politics, society, economy, and culture. programme.title: Those who care
programme.desc: Over 4,000 official volunteers and thousands of those who came at the call of their hearts: the program "Nebyduzhi" reveals the face of foreign volunteering in Ukraine. programme.title: Authors of War
programme.desc: Authors of War examines the powerful role writers and journalists play in shaping how conflicts are understood. Through letters, memoirs, reports and historical works, the series explores how those who documented wars helped preserve the experiences of soldiers and civilians. Each episode revisits major conflicts through the eyes of war correspondents, historians and authors whose words captured the realities of battle, the emotions of those involved and the lasting impact of war on societies and collective memory

By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: FreeDOM
programme.desc: Viewers follow the transformation of homes, renovation projects, and community initiatives in an engaging and informative way. Each episode highlights practical solutions, creative design ideas, and real-life stories, offering inspiration for personal living spaces. The program combines entertainment with useful insights, helping audiences discover innovative ways to enhance comfort, style, and functionality at home.

programme.title: News reports
programme.desc: The program delivers comprehensive reports on current events, providing viewers with detailed information on politics, society, economy, and culture. Episodes present facts clearly and objectively, offering analysis and context to help audiences understand complex issues. By following the program, viewers stay informed about local and global developments, gain insight into ongoing events, and make sense of important news with accuracy and reliability.

programme.title: Mazulīte
programme.desc: Augsta līmeņa vadītāja liek uz spēles savu karjeru un ģimeni, kad sāk kaislīgas attiecības ar krietni jaunāku praktikantu.

programme.title: Bostonas slepkava
programme.desc: 60. gados Bostonu pārbiedē virkne nežēlīgu slepkavību, kuru upuri ir sievietes. Spītējot tā laika uzskatam par sieviešu lomu sabiedrībā un viedokli, ka daiļā dzimuma pārstāvēm jāraksta par modi un izklaidi, nevis jāšķetina nopietni noziegumi, Loreta un viņas kolēģe Džīna Koula atklāj, ka Bostonā notikušās sieviešu nožņaugšanas ir savstarpēji saistītas un tās paveicis sērijveida slepkava. Loreta slepkavu nodēvē par "Bostonas žņaudzēju", četru rakstu sērijā atklājot satraucošas likumsakarības un iestāžu kļūdas, kas ļāva slepkavam nekontrolēti darboties.

programme.title: BlackBerry
programme.desc: Stāsts par pasaules pirmā viedtālruņa galvu reibinošajiem panākumiem un katastrofālo kritienu.

programme.title: Adaptācija
programme.desc: Pazīstams dramaturgs Čārlijs Kaufmans (Nikolass Keidžs) saņem pasūtījumu uzrakstīt filmas scenāriju pēc grāmatas "Orhideju zaglis" motīviem. Tajā žurnāliste Sūzena Orleāna (Merila Strīpa) apraksta avantūristu Džonu Laroču, kas ir tiesāts par īpašu orhideju zādzību no rezervāta. Nespēdams izdomāt scenārijam adekvātu sižeta noslēgumu Čārlijs piekrīt dvīņubrāļa piedāvājumam izsekot žurnālisti. Izrādās, ka grāmatā aprakstītie notikumi ievērojami atšķiras no realitātes un ziedu zagšanai ir pavisam citi iemesli. Sūzena izrādās iesaistījusies avantūrista Laroča dzīvē vairāk nekā parasta vērotāja no malas.

programme.title: Arī divi ir ģimene
programme.desc: Bezrūpīgā brunču mednieka Semjuela dzīvē viss ir vienkārši un viegli, taču kādā jaukā dienā ar mazuli uz rokām uzrodas viena no viņa neskaitāmajām draudzenēm Kristīna. Paziņojusi, ka tā ir viņa meita, Kristīna aizlido uz Londonu, atstājot Semu vienu ar bērniņu. Pēkšņi par tēvu kļuvušais Sems, vēl neatguvies no šoka, kopā ar mazulīti lido uz Angliju cerībā uzmeklēt meitenītes māti. Tā kā meklējumi ir nesekmīgi, Semam atliek vien samierināties ar jauno tēva lomu un vienam audzināt meitu. Taču pēc astoņiem gadiem meitenītes māte tomēr uzrodas….

programme.title: Misija: Izglābt tīģeri
programme.desc: Jauns supervaronis iedraudzējas ar apdraudētu tīģeri, ko sastapis piknika laikā mežā, un uzsāk drosmīgu glābšanas misiju.

programme.title: Lemāna-'66: Lielais izaicinājums
programme.desc: Filmas sižets balstīts patiesos notikumus un atgādina par autosporta vēstures spriedzes pilnām lapaspusēm. Notikumi risinās 60. gados, kad konstruktoru grupa, kuru vadīja Kerols Šelbijs, kopā ar britu sacīkšu braucēju Kenu Mailsu uzbūvēja vēl nebijušu "Ford" sporta automašīnu un meta izaicinājumu Lemānas 24 stundu sacīkšu favorītam "Ferrari".

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Ziemassvētku brīvdienās dodoties uz Parīzi, Makkalisteru ģimene nejauši aizmirst mājās savu astoņgadīgo dēlu Kevinu. Tiesa, tas zēnam neliedz sarīkot pašam savas Ziemassvētku svinības. Beidzot viņu neviens vairs nekomandē, neierobežo un nepieskata! Viss būtu ideāli, ja vien rūdītie kramplauži Harijs un Mārvs nebūtu ieplānojuši apzagt visas tuvākās apkaimes mājas pašā svētku vakarā.

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: ASV Valsts Aizsardzības dienestam ir nozagta slepena mikroshēma. Noziedznieki cer to pārdot un nopelnīt miljoniem dolāru, taču vērtīgā prece nejauši ir nokļuvusi rotaļlietu mašīnā, kas patlaban atrodas kādā mājīgā Čikāgas savrupnamā. Noziedznieki dodas mikroshēmu atgūt. Ceļā viņiem stājas bīstams pretinieks Alekss – astoņgadīgs puišelis, kuram netrūkst izdomas un kurš ir viens pats mājās.

programme.title: After. Pēc mūsu tikšanās
programme.desc: Tesa pavada pirmo dienu prestižā universitātē. Jaunas sejas, vide, grāmatas, kopmītne, universitātes gaiteņi nupat lielisku mācību gada sākumu, patstāvību un ambiciozu mērķi.Taču dzīve ir pilna dažkārt neparedzamu pavērsienu. Pirmā tikšanās ar istabas biedreni Stefu ierauj Tesu studentu dzīves virpulī ar garām naktīm un Hārdinu. Kopā būšana izvēršas par traku piedzīvojumu, taču šķietami skaistajā stāstā apslēpts drūms noslēpums. Kad tas nāks gaismā, Tesas dzīve vairs nebūs tāda kā agrāk.

programme.title: Transformeri: Nezvēru laikmets
programme.desc: Spraigi piedzīvojumi un elpu aizraujošs specefektu vēriens ir aizrāvis "Transformers" filmu fanus visā pasaulē jau kopš pirmās filmas iznākšanas uz kinoekrāniem! Jaunākā filma "Transformeri: Nezvēru laikmets" aizvedīs skatītājus aizraujošā kino piedzīvojumā apkārt pasaulei 90. gados un iepazīstinās ar pilnīgi jauniem transformeriem – The Maximals. Cīņa starp Autobotiem un Maldikoniem norisināsies jaunā līmenī!

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Ir pagājuši pieci gadi, kopš Hiks un Nezobs veiksmīgi apvienoja pūķus un vikingus uz Berkas salas. Kamēr Astrīda, Snūģis un pārējie sacenšas pūķu sacīkstēs (kas ir salas iemītnieku mīļākais sporta veids), nešķiramie draugi iepazīst apkārtni, veidojot līdz šim neatklāto teritoriju karti un atklājot jaunas pasaules. Kārtējā piedzīvojuma laikā viņi atklāj slepenu ledus alu, kur mīt vairāki simti savvaļas pūķu un noslēpumainais Pūķu Jātnieks. Hiku un Nezobu ierauj kaujā par miera saglabāšanu pasaulē. Tagad viņiem jācīnās par to, kam viņi tic, un tikai kopīgiem spēkiem draugi spēs mainīt cilvēku un pūķu nākotni.

programme.title: Ēnu spēle
programme.desc: Treviss Bloks ir FIB problēmu risinātājs. Kad slepenie aģenti nonāk nepatikšanās, Treviss tiek izsaukts, lai viņus izpestītu. Par katru cenu. Taču, kad viens no slepenajiem aģentiem apšauba savas priekšniecības patiesos mērķus, Treviss nonāk asiņainas sazvērestības epicentrā.

programme.title: Alarum
programme.desc: Silvestrs Stallone – spiegu trillerī. Precēts spiegu pāris slēpjas no varas iestādēm, kas meklē pazudušu cieto disku.

programme.title: Maģiskās durvis
programme.desc: Divi praktikanti Pols un Sofija uzsāk karjeru noslēpumainā Londonas uzņēmumā "J.W. Wells & Co". Drīz abi atklāj, ka viņu darba devēji, tostarp harizmātiskais izpilddirektors Hamfrijs Velss un menedžeris Deniss Taners, ievieš revolucionāras pārmaiņas – modernās korporatīvās stratēģijas te tiek apvienotas ar senām burvestībām. Uzņēmuma noslēpumam nākot gaismā, Sofijai un Polam tiek dots uzdevums: atrast spēcīgu maģisku artefaktu - durvis, kas ikvienu acumirklī var aizvest uz jebkuru vietu pasaulē. Tas izrādīsies mīklām, izaicinājumiem un pārdabiskām intrigām pilns ceļojums, jo izgaismos bīstamu patiesību, kas slēpjas aiz "J.Wells & Co".

programme.title: Mazgā mani upē
programme.desc: Narkomāni Šelbijs un viņa draudzene Rūbija cenšas atbrīvoties no atkarības un iet cauri ellei. Rūbija ir gandrīz atkopusies, kad viņu uzrunā sīks noziedznieks, kurš iedod viņai narkotikas, jo nevēlas zaudēt klientu. Atgriezusues mājās, Rūbija padodas atkarībai un injicē sev nāvējošu devu. Satriektais Šelbijs nolemj atriebties par mīļotās traģisko nāvi.

programme.title: Vilks un Lauva
programme.desc: Pēc vectēva nāves 20 gadus vecā pianiste Alma atgriežas bērnības mājās. Drīz viņas dzīvē notiek negaidīts pavērsiens. Nez no kurienes uzradusies vectēva draudzene baltā vilcene atved savu mazuli un pati nozūd. Tad netālu avarē lidmašīna, un meitene tās atlūzās atrod brīnumainā kārtā izdzīvojušu lauvēnu. Alma nolemj abus paturēt, un notiek neticamais – mazuļi kopā aug un iemīl viens otru kā brāļus. Bet idilliskā pasaule sabrūk, kad viņu noslēpums nāk gaismā.

programme.title: Bridžitas Džounsas dienasgrāmata
programme.desc: Bridžeta Džonsa ir jauna sieviete, kas pārdzīvo savu vecumu, svaru, darbu, neveiksmes privātajā dzīvē un citas nepilnības. Pienākot Jaunajam gadam, viņa apņemas beidzot sakārtot savu dzīvi, sākt rakstīt pilnīgi atklātu dienasgrāmatu. Dzīve uzņem apgriezienus, kas viņa sāk romānu ar savu bosu, kas izrādās vienkāršs brunču mednieks, un satiek otru savas dzīves vīrieti, kas izskatās diezgan garlaicīgs, tomēr ir lielisks.

programme.title: Rūķi atgriežas atkal
programme.desc: Helvijas pasaule sagriežas kājām gaisā, kad viņa atklāj, ka pastāv tehniski attīstītu rūķu banda no Vīnes, kas, pretstatā Helvijas klanam, ir nepārspējami jautrības un piedzīvojumu meklētāji. Vai Helvijas draudzība ar Bo, jaunāko no rūķu bandas, spēs samierināt abus rūķu klanus pēc vairāk nekā 250 gadu pārtraukuma?

programme.title: Viņš ir viņa
programme.desc: Ļoti brīva Šekspīra lugas "Divpadsmitā nakts" ekranizācija. Pārvācoties uz citu skolu, Viola maina arī savu izskatu un uzdodas par savu dvīņubrāli Sebastjanu, kurš pats pārcēlies uz Londonu. Taču meitene nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu gaida pārsteigums, – viņa iemīlēsies savā istabas biedrā un skolas karstākajā puisī Djūkā, kura sirds savukārt pieder skaistulei Olīvijai. Taču šī meitene ir pamanījusi Sebastjanu – emocionālo puisi, kādi viņai vienmēr patikuši. Un, kaut arī šķiet, ka nekas nevar būt vēl trakāk, ierodas īstais Sebastjans, kurš nemaz nenojauš, ka viņu aizvieto paša dvīņu māsa!

programme.title: Viens pats mājās
programme.desc: Iepriekšējos Ziemassvētkos, dodoties brīvdienās uz Franciju, Makkalisteri aizmirsa mājās savu jaunāko atvasi Kevinu. Šogad, dodoties uz Floridu, viņi dēlu pazaudē lidostā. Kamēr ģimene lido uz Maiami, Kevins ar tēva kredītkartēm kabatā ir ceļā uz Ņujorku. Lielajā pilsētā viņš atrod jaunus draugus, iekārtojas lepnākajā viesnīcā un sastop arī savus vecos paziņas – divus aprobežotos kramplaužus. Šoreiz abi ļaundari Ziemassvētku vakarā plāno apzagt lielāko rotaļlietu veikalu Ņujorkā. Turklāt viņi jau sen alkst atriebties Kevinam – zēnam, kura dēļ nonāca cietumā.

programme.title: Kā pieradināt pūķi
programme.desc: Skarbajā Berkas salā vikingi un pūķi ir bijuši ienaidnieki paaudžu paaudzēs. Šeit dzīvo Hikaps - jaunietis ar izgudrotāja spējām, varenā vikinga Lielā Stoika dēls. Hikaps pārkāpj gadsimtiem ilgas tradīcijas, sadraudzējoties ar Nezobu - mītiem apvīto Tumsas pūķi. Viņu neticamā draudzība atklās pūķu patieso dabu un pavērs ceļu jaunai ērai pūķu un vikingu pasaulē.

programme.title: Zirnekļcilvēks: Ceļojums Zirnekļpasaulē
programme.desc: Fils Lords un Kristofers Millers, radošie prāti aiz "Lego filma" un "Džampstrīta 21", apvieno savus talantus un pieņem izaicinājumu – radīt unikālu skatījumu par komiksu pasaulē labi zināmo Zirnekļcilvēka visumu. Viņiem tas izdodas ar elpu aizraujošu stāstu un līdz šim neredzētu vizuālo noformējumu, pelnīti saņemot Oskaru par gada labāko animācijas filmu. "Zirnekļcilvēks. Ceļojums Zirnekļpasaulē" mūs iepazīstina ar jauno Maiklu Moralesu un vēl pieciem spilgtiem personāžiem no dažādām dimensijām, kuri apveltīti ar zirnekļ-supervaroņa spējām. Tikai darbojoties kopā, viņi var apturēt briesmas, kas apdraud visas realitātes.

programme.title: Džūdija
programme.desc: Biogrāfiska drāma par izcilās ASV dziedātājas un aktrises Džūdijas Gārlendas dzīvi. Gārlenda 1968. gadā, gadu pirms savas nāves, devās uz Eiropu, lai koncertētu Londonā. Filmā attēloti pēdējie mēneši kinozvaigznes dzīvē, pirms viņa izdarīja pašnāvību.

programme.title: Jauns sākums
programme.desc: Greta un viņas draugs Deivs ir muzikanti un dziesmu autori, kopā jau ilgus gadus kopš koledžas laikiem. Brīdī, kad Deivs saņem piedāvājumu ierakstīt albumu no lielas ierakstu kompānijas, viņi pārvācas uz dzīvi Ņujorkā. Jauniegūtās slavas savaldzināts, Deivs pamet Gretu un uzsāk savu jauno mūziķa karjeru. Gretas dzīvē pozitīvu pavērsienu ienes nejauša satikšanās ar Denu, izbijušu ierakstu kompānijas menedžeri. Brīdī, kad Dens ierauga Gretu muzicējam nomaļā pilsētas klubā, viņu vienā mirklī apbur meitenes muzikālais talants un šarms. Līdz ar šo nejaušo sastapšanos abu dzīves ir nesaraujami saistītas, ļaujot sadziedēt brūces un sasniegt mērķus gan profesionālajā karjerā, gan privātajā dzīvē. Jauns dzīves sākums izstāstīts uz Ņujorkas vasaras fona.

programme.title: Balerīna
programme.desc: Slepkava, apmācīta Ruska Roma organizācijas tradīcijās, dodas atriebt tēva nāvi.

programme.title: Didi
programme.desc: 2008. gadā, pēdējā vasaras mēnesī pirms vidusskolas sākuma, 13 gadus vecs zēns iemācās to, ko viņa ģimene nevar viņam iemācīt: kā slidot, kā flirtēt un kā mīlēt savu mammu.

programme.title: Motobraucēji
programme.desc: Pēc nejaušas tikšanās pārgalvīgo Ketiju piesaista Benijs, Vidusrietumu motokluba "Vandals" biedrs. Klubam pārtopot par bīstamu vardarbības perēkli, Benijam ir jāizvēlas starp Ketiju un viņa lojalitāti klubam.

programme.title: Futbols: Ligue 1. Marseille - Rennes
programme.desc: PSG, AS Monaco, Marseille, Olympique Lyonnais & Lille... just to name a few. Ligue 1 is currently full of well-organised football teams and incredible European talent, who are a complement to the sport. As the highest professional division in France, it has established itself as one of the top five leagues on the continent. Lyon are the most successful team in regards to consecutive titles, whereas PSG and AS Monaco have managed to propel themselves to the highest achievements in the league, with calculated foreign investment. With the latter coming from a principality, Ligue 1 is another example of a domestic league that provides cross-border competition. From southern wine-growing regions such as Bordeaux, to the historically renowned capital of Paris, we cover the whole of France.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Real Oviedo - Alaves
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

programme.title: Futbols: LaLiga. Sevilla - Real Madrid
programme.desc: La Liga (The Campeonato Nacional de Liga de Primera División) is the men's top professional football division of the Spanish football league system. It is administered by the National Professional Football League and has 20 contestants, with the three lowest-placed teams at the end of each season relegated to the Segunda División and replaced by the top two teams and a play-off winner in that division. Nine teams have become champions, Real Madrid has got the title 33 times and FC Barcelona 26 times. La Liga is one of the most popular professional sports leagues in the world and the top league in Europe over the last five years.

Anything But Gray
programme.desc: A family with traditional style pushes Gray and team to creatively merge classic Charleston, SC style with still-vibrant, teen-approved designs.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Erin and Ben Napier love their small Mississippi hometown, especially the old historical houses. Using found materials and old textiles, they're keeping the character of these classic homes but giving them modern and affordable updates. From Erin's imaginative hand sketches to Ben's custom handiwork, this couple is bringing homes back to life and making sure their small town's future is as bright as its past.

programme.title: Fixer Upper: Welcome Home
programme.desc: Chip and Jo are back with new ideas for turning outdated homes into jaw-dropping, innovative living spaces. Having expanded their business (and their family), the Gaineses now juggle more while renovating, which keeps things unpredictable.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple living in a busy Seattle suburb wants to slow down and focus on each other. He sold her on an easy commute to work from Camano Island, WA, and now they hope to find an open-concept home where they can entertain family.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: A couple is tired of their boring lifestyle in Urbana, Ohio, and wants to liven things up on Indian Lake. They hope to find a large turnkey home with space for extended family, as well as a dock for the boat he's always wanted.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Attempting to bring families' dreams come to life, but on a budget, Beachfront Bargain Hunt shows that you don't have to be a millionaire if you want to live a life by the sea! Narrated by John Beach, this show follows a number of couples, families and people looking just for themselves exploring various beachfront's in USA, looking for homes that won't break the bank. programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: American reality series following host Suzanne Whang on her quest to help people relocate in search of their dream home. Follow the individuals, couples and families in an international search for their perfect property, exploring a stunning selection of homes chosen just for them. With three potential candidates to choose from, join them as they try and make the difficult decision to start a new life abroad. Revisit the new homeowners at the end of each episode to see how their properties have developed and how life has changed for them since the move.

programme.title: Flip or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek is a self-proclaimed real estate genius with determination and drive. Christina is Tarek's picture-perfect wife, who Tarek's friends still can't believe he landed. In each episode of "Flip or Flop", Tarek and Christina flip a new property. From the nail-biting purchase at auction, to the frustrating renovations and maddening showings, to the giddy acceptance of an offer, we'll follow along as these two relatively novice flippers try their hand at the toughest game in town. From purchase to resale, weaving their personal lives within the story of the flip. From paying cash, sight unseen, for a property at auction, through the hapless remodeling process, to the frantic sale, this young couple is putting everything they have into this venture.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Josh and Stephanie have lived near water since they were born, and now that they are getting married, moving to be near water only makes good sense. The beautiful views of Washington State's San Juan Islands are calling them home.

programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: Most people only fantasize about living on an island, but we'll prove that an Island Life is possible for anyone. Tropical dreamers will be shown island properties that fit into any budget, from ultra-affordable to totally outrageous. We'll follow everyday families is search of their own slice of paradise, and prove that fantasy can be reality.

programme.title: House Hunters Renovation
programme.desc: Finding the perfect home is never easy, but these aspirational house hunters don't plan on making it any easier for themselves. Meet the budding designers, builders and decorators determined to start from scratch and take on the mega projects all for themselves. Each episode features a new group of hopefuls looking to find cheap run-down houses with the aim of rapidly transforming them into their dream family homes. As families and friends embark on their mission to construct their future homes, follow their progress as they encounter all of excitement, stress and chaos that comes with home renovation.

programme.title: Anything But Gray
programme.desc: A family with traditional style pushes Gray and team to creatively merge classic Charleston, SC style with still-vibrant, teen-approved designs.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Recent lottery winners look for their perfect dream house in this "House Hunters"-inspired reality show. David Bromstad takes recent lottery winners on over-the-top house hunts for their new dream homes. Whether they win hundreds of thousands or hundreds of millions, lucky lottery winners everywhere are jumping headfirst into the real estate market. Will they spend all their winnings on an extravagant mansion or settle for a humble sound investment? Find out what happens when average Americans set out to find "My Lottery Dream Home".

programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous
programme.desc: A family that survived a devastating house fire buys a home on the lake so they can enjoy their favorite spot year-round. However, the lack of space doesn't fit their needs, so they ask Dave and Jenny to completely overhaul the rustic cabin.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Beautiful and innovative home renos inspired by stunning natural surroundings get a spotlight in the new HGTV series, Building Roots. Starring husband and wife duo Ben and Cristi Dozier, the series features the couple as they build, design and renovate properties in their dreamy hometown of Pagosa Springs, Colorado. During the series, Ben and Cristi produce one-of-a-kind, highly personalized work that always exceeds their clients' expectations.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: Kristen dreams of watching her kids grow up in a small town like she did, but as a military family, they are always on the move. Now that husband Kelvin is close to retirement, they've decided to settle down so their young children have a place to call home. Kelvin and Kristen's all-in budget is $250,000, so Ben and Erin show the couple two family-friendly homes: a big, old charmer that's a lot of house, and a character-rich Craftsman with a lower price but a longer "to do" list. Ben and Erin create the ultimate family home including a study area, play space and stunning new kitchen with a unique bowling alley countertop.

programme.title: Home Town
programme.desc: After moving to New York City to pursue his architect career, Bill is ready to settle down with his fiance Jody in the small town he's loved since childhood. Ben and Erin show the couple two very different homes -- a dilapidated historic house with character that requires a ton of work, and a Craftsman that needs updates and a personality. With an all-in budget of $200,000, Ben and Erin transform the couple's pick into a dream home with a gorgeous kitchen and custom millwork.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project
programme.desc: Designing duo Nate Berkus and Jeremiah Brent help moving families get a fresh start. They aid their clients in letting go of what they no longer need before renovating the property into the perfect dream home for the family's next stage of life.

programme.title: The Nate And Jeremiah Home Project

programme.title: Help! I Wrecked My House
programme.desc: American home improvement series. Presenter Jasmine Roth visits the homes of DIY catastrophes to restore them back to a liveable space. programme.title: Fixer To Fabulous

programme.title: Mexico Life
programme.desc: Mexico is a country unlike many others; gorgeous climate, a Caribbean coastline, vibrant cities, and unimaginable history. Follow the couples and families as they set off on a Mexican adventure that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: Home Town

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: A couple aspires to run a family business renovating homes. They soon find that for their first flip, a huge house is not for the faint of heart.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: After a dishwasher disaster, these realtors decide to revamp their dated Washington home in a whimsical cottage style on a tight budget.

programme.title: Windy City Rehab
programme.desc: Windy City Rehab is a reality renovation show hosted by interior designer Alison Victoria. She and her expert team buy and restore old homes in her beloved Chicago historic neighborhoods. It is much more than a simple improvement of a house. Alison and her team are rescuing vintage houses and hold true to the original style and architecture as much as possible. They do their best to pay tribute to the historic roots, while integrating some modern makeovers.

programme.title: Inside Out
programme.desc: The seven-episode series follows Carmine, a real estate agent and interior designer, and Mike, a landscape designer, as they each pitch their design plans to clients. programme.title: Island Life
programme.desc: As their daughters get older, Georgia residents Lisa and Kevin are looking for a change of pace from their busy lives. They're looking for a home in Hilton Head, SC, that their kids will always want to return to.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: From ceremonies featuring garments reminiscent of spacesuits to masked dancers with alien-like faces, history is rich with traditions that seem to honour mysterious beings. Could these be echoes of real encounters with something not of this Earth?

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: For the first time, the "Pawn Stars" are hitting the road to visit some of America's most exciting places in search of historical finds and impressive collectible objects in the new 8-part series "Pawn Stars Do America." Each two-hour episode follows Rick Harrison, Corey Harrison and Austin "Chumlee" Russell as they step out of the World Famous Gold & Silver Pawn Shop in Las Vegas to connect with fans in eight different cities and acquire some of the most remarkable items imaginable.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island
programme.desc: For over two centuries, teams of searchers, including Franklin D. Roosevelt, have attempted to crack the code that will unearth the treasure believed to be buried on the small island off the coast of Nova Scotia. Armed with the knowledge of those that came before them, the muscle of heavy machinery and decades of engineering know-how, brothers Rick and Marty Lagina and their partners may be closer than anyone in history to finding the treasure that has so far claimed the lives of six men.

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: From the producers of Ancient Aliens® and The Curse of Oak Island® From alleged UFO encounters to sudden disappearances to evil possessions, series host William Shatner attempts to get to the truth behind the most bizarre and mysterious events ever reported. With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

With the help of the world's top scientists, first-hand "experiencer" accounts, and dramatic reenactments, viewers gain shocking insight into what's really happening--and why.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: The world's most mysterious videos, photos, and audio recordings, and uses the best technology and experts to render a credible verdict. Each episode analyzes and passes verdicts on several seemingly impossible things "caught on film" including giant beasts, UFOS, apocalyptic sounds, hairy humans, alleged mutants from the deep, conspiracies, and many other cases. Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

Host and veteran journalist Tony Harris takes nothing for granted in a quest for answers, tracking down eyewitnesses, putting each photo or film through a battery of tests, calling out the hoaxes, and highlighting the most credible evidence in an attempt to better understand our world.

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Is a video showing a strange formation of flickering lights the latest proof that Houston is a UFO hotspot? What is this mysterious humanoid creature caught on camera in an abandoned attic? Was the Government caught transporting Alien technology at a top-secret military base? And why the latest Provo Utah Bigfoot sighting seems to put the "Big" in Bigfoot. Tony Harris and his team of experts examine the clues and decide the validity of what we're seeing.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Long before banks, ATMs and check-cashing services, there were pawn shops. Pawning was the leading form of consumer credit in the United States until the 1950s, and pawn shops are still helping everyday people make ends meet. "Pawn Stars" takes you inside the colorful world of the pawn business. At the Gold & Silver Pawn Shop on the outskirts of Las Vegas, three generations of the Harrison family — grandfather Richard, son Rick and grandson Corey — jointly run the family business, and there's clashing and camaraderie every step of the way. The three men use their sharp eyes and skills to assess the value of items from the commonplace to the truly historic, including a 16th-century samurai sword, a Super Bowl ring, a Picasso painting and a 17th-century stay of execution. It's up to them to determine what's real and what's fake, as they reveal the often surprising answer to the questions on everyone's mind, "What's the story behind it?" and "What's it worth?"

programme.desc: From a Fabergé egg found at a humble flea market, to a backyard sapphire worth a king's ransom. These treasures prove that sometimes one person's forgotten clutter can become another's once-in-a-lifetime discovery.

programme.title: Chasing Mummies
programme.desc: Reality series following the adventures of Egyptologist Dr Zahi Hawass and his team as they search for the secrets of ancient Egypt. Travelling across this fascinating country, Dr Zahi Hawass and his crew embark on a historical and archaeological expedition – and try to preserve important artefacts.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: Documentary series that brings back to life lost cities, structures, cultures, and civilisations, transporting viewers back in time and revealing the truth behind some of history's most iconic eras. Using a combination of cutting-edge technology and archaeological research, the team detail what life was like for these places during their peak of their powers, and use visual overlays to compare past and present landscapes. From the Knights Templar to the lost city of Atlantis, ancient Egypt to Hitler's planned supercity, and ancient Athens to America's wild west, each episodes dives into these extraordinary remnants of human history.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: The Universe

We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Engineering an Empire
programme.desc: In an era long passed, mighty empires were forged from nothing and rose to the heights of power. Join host Peter Weller, an actor and a professor at Syracuse University as he travels the world to show the engineering feats that gave rise to some of the greatest civilizations known to man. From Rome to the Pharaohs' Egypt, from Greece to Carthage, from the Aztecs to the Maya and more, this new program from the History Channel uses computer graphics to explore the architectural, political and cultural glory of the world's greatest empires.

programme.title: Chasing Mummies
programme.desc: Reality series following the adventures of Egyptologist Dr Zahi Hawass and his team as they search for the secrets of ancient Egypt. Travelling across this fascinating country, Dr Zahi Hawass and his crew embark on a historical and archaeological expedition – and try to preserve important artefacts.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.desc: Why were trunks belonging to genius inventor Nikola Tesla confiscated in 1943? programme.title: U-Boat Wargamers
programme.desc: When WW2 breaks out, an elite force of German U-boat commanders attempt to starve Britain into submission. Vera Mathews heads the reformed WRENS. Meanwhile retired naval commander Gilbert Roberts is desperate to return to his career.

programme.title: Warriors
programme.desc: The Romans, with the greatest army in the world, are annihilated by Germanic tribes at the Battle of Teutoburg Forest. Go inside the culture of some of the most famous warriors to explore their weaponry, tactics and, ultimately, their psyche.

Whether they are investigating a mysterious Nazi lair deep in the Argentinian jungle or diving for evidence of a missing U-Boat that could of shuttled Hitler to South America our team will focus on the tried and tested tenants for solving a fraudulent death case: follow the money where was the subject last seen, eyewitness reports, make contact with known associates and forensics.With declassified worldwide intelligence providing a wealth of new clues and modern technology never before available we reopen this world famous cold case in hopes of solving the mystery surrounding the demise of one of the biggest criminals of all time.

programme.title: Cities of the Underworld
programme.desc: In major cities around the world today, skyscrapers loom overhead, taxis honk their horns and street vendors peddle their wares. But below lies city upon city - each with its fascinating and unknown history. This series will explore these layers, which are often hundreds of feet deep, and examine a city's ancient cisterns, dank dungeons, eerie tombs, clandestine hideouts, and even underground shipwrecks that have been lost for hundreds and hundreds of years. What are the underground layers of the most populated cities on earth? And how did (and do) engineers build layer upon layer up to today's city streets? This series will reveal the technological marvels that allowed the construction of one city upon another - literally.

programme.title: Lost Worlds
programme.desc: A gripping story about a day in the life of two rival gang members, one a Crip, the other a Blood, who also happens to be cousins, Curtis and Terrance. Curtis, an unreformed ex-inmate who was just recently released from jail, ask Terrance to drive him to a job interview, stopping at the bank on the way. Unbeknownst to Terrance, Curtis goes into the bank, robs it! Terrance drive's off, confused and scared, does whatever Curtis says as they end up with two kidnapped college cheerleaders as their hostages.

programme.title: The Universe
programme.desc: Every day, new information is discovered that helps us better understand how our Universe works. Some of this evidence solves mysteries dating back thousands of years. Some evidence offers new theories on how human civilization came into existence. In this season of The Universe: Ancient Mysteries Solved, we'll tackle mysteries such as an American Stonehenge built 500 years before Columbus, and how the Aztec Pyramids helped seal the downfall of the Mayan and Aztec empires. We'll also look at some of the Roman Empires' most iconic structures, and their connection to archeo-astronomy.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Explores the controversial theory that extraterrestrials have visited Earth for millions of years. From the age of the dinosaurs to ancient Egypt, from early cave drawings to continued mass sightings in the US, each episode gives historic depth to the questions, speculations, provocative controversies, first-hand accounts and grounded theories surrounding this age old debate. Did intelligent beings from outer space visit Earth thousands of years ago?

programme.title: Rome: Rise & Fall of an Empire
programme.desc: It is 113 BC Rome is a Republic, a small empire that clings to the rim of the Mediterranean. Though a democracy in name and spirit, a man must be rich and from the noble class to hold the highest offices, both political and military. The system has worked well for three centuries. But now a barbarian horde known as the Cimbri smashes through the northern imperial border. One humiliating defeat follows another, with losses of hundreds of thousands of Roman legionaries. Terror grips Rome and drives her into the arms of General Marius. Though he is a commoner, he has a brilliant military mind. To defeat the Cimbri, Marius will transform the Roman army and shake the Republic's political foundations to the core. It is a turning point for the Republic. Faced with the savage Cimbri, Rome must decide between dictatorship or annihilation.

programme.title: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: The Alaska Triangle, a region in northwest Alaska, has more unsolved missing person cases than anywhere else in the world. Over 20,000 people have vanished in the past 50 years alone. Who or what's behind these cases is unknown. Some believe it's the work of local predators or simply the rugged, dangerous terrain, but legends thrive in Alaska, and the ominous history of disappearances in the area has drawn comparisons to the Bermuda Triangle. Working together with local experts and eyewitnesses, our team of investigators will go case-by-case to gather evidence, conduct tests, examine history and explore local myths to determine the most viable explanation for the disappearances, all while trying to understand the sinister mystery that is the Alaska Triangle.

programme.title: Lost Relics of the Knights Templar
programme.desc: Lost Relic Hunters follows the work of one of the world's most prolific collectors of antiquities, Hamilton White, and his long-time friend and business partner, Carl Cookson. The intrepid duo are back on the trail of some truly astonishing relics and historical pieces, which, if authenticated, will potentially change our understanding of some of the most iconic periods of British and European history. Aided in their adventures by cultural and art historian Dr Janina Ramirez, Lost Relic Hunters sees Carl and Hamilton journey to breath-taking locations around the world including Venice, Istanbul, Barcelona, Jerusalem and the Pyrenees, in their quest to authenticate the rare and precious antiquities from Hamilton's collection.

programme.title: Hunting Hitler
programme.desc: An FBI cold case that has laid dormant for 70 years leads a group of world-renown investigators on the ultimate manhunt to finally answer the question: Did Adolf Hitler survive World War II? In early 2014 the FBI declassified hundreds of confidential documents showing that Hitler may have not committed suicide but rather escaped to South America after the fall of Germany. A memo from J. Edgar Hoover himself states "American Army officials in Germany have not located Hitler's body nor is there any reliable source that will say definitely that Hitler is dead." Armed with the most cutting edge technology and these newly released FBI files the team will approach this case like a modern death claims investigation. These stories transcended news and became part of pop culture, revealing shocking twists, new evidence, and unexpected resolutions. Interlaced within every episode are exclusive interviews with People's journalists, archival footage, re-creations, and firsthand accounts by those closest to the investigations.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: If you looked into the eyes of a killer, would you know? In American Monster, you find out. For the first time, viewers get closer than ever to some of America's most shocking and surprising crimes. Filled with never-before-seen footage of these devils in disguise, from home movie shots of them playing with their kids to musical performances at high school, from the church cook-out to the wedding video, American Monster interweaves twisting-turning stories of astonishing crimes, with 'behind-the-scenes' footage of killers at their seemingly most innocent.

programme.title: American Monster
programme.desc: If you looked into the eyes of a killer, would you know? In American Monster, you find out. For the first time, viewers get closer than ever to some of America's most shocking and surprising crimes. Filled with never-before-seen footage of these devils in disguise, from home movie shots of them playing with their kids to musical performances at high school, from the church cook-out to the wedding video, American Monster interweaves twisting-turning stories of astonishing crimes, with 'behind-the-scenes' footage of killers at their seemingly most innocent.

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: When Paul Stocks is scammed by a bogus travel agent, he soon realised he was part of a huge holiday scam involving hundreds of victims and over a million pounds.

programme.title: The Big Swindle
programme.desc: When Sue Hughes falls Ste, she sends him £100,000 to help with his cancer treatment. Sue's life falls apart when she discovers that everything is a lie.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells true and often tragic stories of the crimes perpetrated on the internet and of deception and manipulation triggered by online interactions - from predators lurking behind Facebook profiles to maniacs searching for their victims in chat rooms. Series includes re-enactments, comments from law enforcement personnel, true-crime experts, psychologists and interviews from friends and families of the victims. Rare episodes feature victims who were extremely lucky to survive and are able to tell us what happened.

programme.title: Web of Lies
programme.desc: Documentary series that tells true and often tragic stories of the crimes perpetrated on the internet and of deception and manipulation triggered by online interactions - from predators lurking behind Facebook profiles to maniacs searching for their victims in chat rooms. Series includes re-enactments, comments from law enforcement personnel, true-crime experts, psychologists and interviews from friends and families of the victims. Rare episodes feature victims who were extremely lucky to survive and are able to tell us what happened.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: True crime documentary series examining the troubling task law enforcement officers have, as they scour murder crime scenes for potential clues and evidence that will help them identify the culprit. With dramatic reconstructions that paint a picture of the brutal killing, each episode focusses on a respective case, as detectives scramble to catch the killer. Every potential item of evidence is pieced together, hoping to complete the sinister puzzle and bring justice for the family and friends of the deceased. As they uncover more about the victims, the detectives learn of their dark and mysterious secrets.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: True crime documentary series examining the troubling task law enforcement officers have, as they scour murder crime scenes for potential clues and evidence that will help them identify the culprit. With dramatic reconstructions that paint a picture of the brutal killing, each episode focusses on a respective case, as detectives scramble to catch the killer. Every potential item of evidence is pieced together, hoping to complete the sinister puzzle and bring justice for the family and friends of the deceased. As they uncover more about the victims, the detectives learn of their dark and mysterious secrets.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice
programme.desc: No one solves a murder by themselves - it takes a skilled and dedicated team to identify, catch, and prosecute killers - and nowhere is that truer than in Atlanta, Georgia. Each Atlanta Justice episode follows investigators from Atlanta's storied Homicide Unit and skilled prosecutors from the Fulton County District Attorney's Office. Viewers will be immersed in the world of big city detectives as they solve Atlanta's most baffling and horrifying crimes and track down the city's most deadly criminals. Atlanta's Homicide Unit consistently has one of the highest clearance rates in the county, and its success is due, at least in part, to the fact that the Homicide Unit reflects the diversity of the city it serves, and that is something that will be on display in every episode of Atlanta Justice.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice
programme.desc: A few EMTs are having a coffee break when a man drives up and runs to them, covered in blood. He says his name is Richard Davis and that he's been shot. At the hospital, Richard tells the ER doctor that he offered a mysterious woman a ride back to her apartment when he saw her with a broken-down vehicle. After he dropped her off, he was ambushed and shot by an unknown assailant. Richard then succumbs to his wounds, leaving it up to Detective Redlinger and her team to track down the mystery woman that lured Richard to his death.

programme.title: American Nightmare
programme.desc: During a storm in Key Largo, Florida, an intruder slips silently into the home of newlyweds Michael and Missy MacIvor. As the day dawns, a nightmare is revealed that will haunt the entire community for years to come.

programme.title: American Nightmare
programme.desc: Graduation is nearing at Northeastern University, students are alarmed at the discovery of a fellow co-ed shot to death in her apt. Detectives face many challenges in the investigation until they realize the answer is right there.

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: True crime documentary series. In these close-knitted communities, horrific murders have occurred, shaking them to the core. Every episode tells the story of a gruesome murder that happened in a small town. Delve into the heart of the cases through interviews with investigators, family members, prosecutors and neighbours. Various twists and turns can make you question reality, and the final outcome can surprise everyone involved. How well do you know the people next door?

programme.title: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: True crime documentary series. In these close-knitted communities, horrific murders have occurred, shaking them to the core. programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: After a store robbery turns into abduction, Texas Ranger Jim Holland tracks a suspect to a motel and presses for the missing owner's location.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Child the Killer
programme.desc: A father discovers his son committed three murders and makes the agonising choice to turn him in, a decision that destroys their relationship forever.

programme.title: American Detective with Lt. Joe Kenda
programme.desc: In American Detective, Kenda trades in his own case files to bring viewers astounding investigations from across the country, with each episode featuring a different homicide detective whose tireless efforts helped put a killer behind bars and bring justice for the victim.

programme.title: Dog Detectives
programme.desc: Not only are they friendly, cuddly, kind and loyal, but man's best friend can also use their canine instincts to help law enforcement officials catch criminals. Using their remarkable sense of smell, which is up to 100,000 times more effective than that of humans, these policing pooches unearth deadly narcotics, smuggled goods such as ivory and even illegal immigrants. In this reality series we celebrate these canine crime fighters and the unbreakable bonds they have with their human handlers, showcasing their incredible abilities when out on call with UK police officers.

programme.title: Killer Confessions: Case Files Of A Texas Ranger
programme.desc: After a store robbery turns into abduction, Texas Ranger Jim Holland tracks a suspect to a motel and presses for the missing owner's location.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning

Every potential item of evidence is pieced together, hoping to complete the sinister puzzle and bring justice for the family and friends of the deceased. As they uncover more about the victims, the detectives learn of their dark and mysterious secrets.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: Вместо выигранной поездки в Европу, Хор отправляют с концертами на БАМ. Грачев пытается протестовать. Лариса и Андрей возвращаются с юга в Москву вместе. Неожиданно Андрея увольняют с работы и вскоре арестовывают. Кеша уверен, что это дело рук его отца. На БАМе у Юры начинаются проблемы с голосом. Он думает, что простудился. Вернувшись в Москву, Юра слышит страшный приговор врача — началась возрастная мутация голоса…

programme.title: С.С.С.Р.
programme.desc: Весна 1981 года. Олимпиада позади, но еще не стерлась со стен олимпийская символика. Спокойное, мирное, сонное время – брежневский застой. Четверо друзей возвращаются из армии, вместе они прошли огонь и воду, нештатные ситуации, спасали друг другу жизнь. В шутку они называют себя "СССР" по первым буквам имен – Сергей, Семен, Самвел и Рома. История дружбы и взросления развивается на фоне стремительно меняющейся страны, но у их "СССР", в отличие от Советского Союза, есть надежда. Союз друзей сохранится, хотя за десять лет не раз будет испытан на прочность.

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Съёмочная группа программы "Ждем в гости" побывала в селе Алексеевка, муниципалитета Тетри-Цкаро (Грузия) чтобы рассказать об одной замечательной семье, которая удивила самых искушенных ценителей легендарного виски. Не используя никаких шотландских или ирландских классических технологий, здесь для получения виски используют традиционный глиняный кувшин квеври , в котором грузины уже более 8000 лет производят вино.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Два с половиной человека
programme.desc: Закоренелый холостяк Чарли, постоянно опасающийся за свою свободу, и его брат Алан, недавно разошедшийся с женой, живут под одной крышей. Чарли только и делает, что заводит любовные интрижки, а Алан всеми силами пытается от него не отстать. В свободное от амурных приключений время братья воспитывают десятилетнего сынишку Алана Джейка.

programme.title: Одиночество
programme.desc: С первой же встречи Сергей и Арина почувствовали, что готовы создать семью. Молодые люди решили оформить свои отношения после возвращения Сергея из срочной командировки, которую он не мог отменить. К сожалению, во время экспедиции произошел несчастный случай: Сергей оказался в плену у стихии и не смог выбраться из пещеры. Спасатели сомневаются в том, что найдут его живым, но Арина надеется на чудо.

programme.title: Утро
programme.desc: Утренняя новостная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Одиночество
programme.desc: С первой же встречи Сергей и Арина почувствовали, что готовы создать семью. Молодые люди решили оформить свои отношения после возвращения Сергея из срочной командировки, которую он не мог отменить. К сожалению, во время экспедиции произошел несчастный случай: Сергей оказался в плену у стихии и не смог выбраться из пещеры. Спасатели сомневаются в том, что найдут его живым, но Арина надеется на чудо.

programme.title: Ждём в гости
programme.desc: Проект "Ждем в гости" побывал в "хлебном краю" Грузии, регионе Самцхе-Джавахети. Здесь в конце лета идет сбор урожая пшеницы. И, казалось бы, обычная картина для сельской местности, но дело в том, что Грузия сильно зависима от импорта зерновых, и перед хлеборобами стоит непростая задача, максимально сократить экспорт и обеспечить страну мукой из грузинской пшеницы. Как пекут в сельской местности в каменной печи хлеб по старинному рецепту? Грузинский фольклор и песни, посвященные сбору урожая пшеницы.

programme.title: На перекрестке радости и горя
programme.desc: Вера Сергеевна вынуждена переехать из родного города Санкт-Петербурга в небольшой провинциальный город. Там она и устраивается преподавателем литературы в местную школу. В первый же день у Веры разгорается конфликт с задиристой ученицей Дашей. Вера возмущена поведением девочки и не подозревает, что у нее серьезные проблемы в семье. Родители Даши в разводе, она живет с отцом Евгением, владельцем местной лесопилки, и уже 5 лет не видела мать - восходящую актрису Жанну, которая слишком занята карьерой, чтобы заботиться о дочери. А тут еще отец привозит к ним в дом оставшуюся сиротой двоюродную сестру Даши — Настю.

programme.title: На перекрестке радости и горя
programme.desc: После конфликта с учителем Даша перестает посещать уроки литературы. Вера Сергеевна вызывает в школу ее отца. Но понимания она не находит. Евгений показывает себя не с лучшей стороны — грубит и упрекает в конфликте саму Веру. Дома Вере "не дают спать спокойно" скандалы соседей. Ее сосед-алкоголик Вася постоянно напивается и устраивает разборки со своей гражданской женой Ольгой. Вскоре Ольге удается сбежать от ненавистного мужа и устроиться поварихой на лесопилку к Евгению. Но Вася от нее так быстро не отступится…

programme.title: Орёл и Решка. Земляне
programme.desc: Армянский народ славится не только своими знаменитостями (Шер, семейство Кардашьян, Иван Айвазовский и Серж Танкян), но и множеством известных изобретений. Итак, армяне изобрели: аппарат МРТ, пластическую хирургию, видеомагнитофон, дворники для машины и даже цвет американского доллара! Также армяне считают, что первыми вырастили абрикос, приготовили долму, лаваш и шашлык. Так есть ли хоть что-то, чего жители Армении не могут? Кирилл Макашов познакомит тебя с художником и ювелиром Нуром, чьи работы оцениваются в десятки миллионов долларов, а также с высоты птичьего полета покажет храм Гарни и местное чудо света - скалу "Симфония камней". А Michelle Andrade докажет, что армяне - самые гостеприимные люди на планете.

programme.title: Провинциальный детектив
programme.desc: В доме у нового владельца химического комбината убита прима местного драмтеатра Ксения Мещерякова. Ее отравили изощренным способом - оцарапали заточенной заколкой, а на рану нанесли отравленные духи. Все в городе считают, что Ксения сама виновата. Когда у женщины муж и двое любовников одновременно, один из них вполне может не выдержать и убить ее. Но что, если мужчины тут ни при чем? Ключ к разгадке Татьяне помогает найти отец Браун.

programme.title: Главное
programme.desc: Ежедневная информационная программа Настоящего времени.

programme.title: Пять минут тишины. Возвращение
programme.desc: Александр Грек, вернувшись после стажировки в Москву и узнав, что его невеста Лина, с которой он собирался окончательно расстаться, беременна, принимает решение жениться на матери своего ребенка. Однако остаться в столице у него не получается: ему уготована служба в отдалённом районе, и он просит направить его назад, в Карелию. Лина решает ехать с ним и там играть свадьбу. Вернувшись в Карелию, Греку предстоит пережить объяснение с Таней, которую он любит, и с Гиреевым, который зол на молодого человека, заставившего страдать его дочь.

programme.title: С.С.С.Р.
programme.desc: Весна 1981 года. Олимпиада позади, но еще не стерлась со стен олимпийская символика. Спокойное, мирное, сонное время – брежневский застой. Четверо друзей возвращаются из армии, вместе они прошли огонь и воду, нештатные ситуации, спасали друг другу жизнь. В шутку они называют себя "СССР" по первым буквам имен – Сергей, Семен, Самвел и Рома. История дружбы и взросления развивается на фоне стремительно меняющейся страны, но у их "СССР", в отличие от Советского Союза, есть надежда. Союз друзей сохранится, хотя за десять лет не раз будет испытан на прочность.

programme.title: Лицом к событию
programme.desc: Лидер в той или иной сфере общественной жизни - человек известный и информированный - под перекрестным огнем вопросов ведущих программы Михаила Соколова и Елены Рыковцевой.

programme.title: Хор
programme.desc: 1972 год. Однажды услышав песни Робертино Лоретти, 12-летний школьник из Люберец Юра тоже начинает петь. Сначала он стесняется этого, ведь пение, по мнению его сверстников и некоторых взрослых, — совсем не мужское занятие. Но, благодаря наставничеству молодой учительницы музыки Варвары, Юра развивает свой талант и решается пройти прослушивание в хор Грачева. У руководителя хора есть всего месяц, чтобы расширить состав исполнителей и подготовить новую программу для участия в телефестивале "Песня года".
